config.bonusmultiplier.tooltip: Scales the friendship bonus up or down (1.0 = default, 2.0 = double bonus)
dialogue.question: {{npc}} can trade specialty items with you. Current bonus: +{{bonus}}%. What would you like to do?
dialogue.sell: I'd like to sell you some items
shop.greeting.clint: Show me what you've got! I'll pay well for quality ores and gems.
shop.greeting.marnie: I'm always looking for good animal products! Let me see what you have.
shop.greeting.gus: Got any delicious dishes or premium produce? I'll happily take them off your hands!
shop.greeting.willy: Fresh catch? I know quality fish when I see it!
shop.greeting.robin: Building materials or fences? I can always use more supplies!
shop.greeting.pierre: Fresh produce from the farm? Let me take a look!
shop.greeting.krobus: I sense... interesting items. Show me what you carry.
